created_for: Focus Negotium Inc / Focus Records LLC / Royal Lee Construction Solutions LLC / Flux & Crave partner lanes

policy.hf_token_source: HF_TOKEN environment variable or local Hugging Face auth cache
policy.operator_goal: maximum useful autonomy for owned business tasks while retaining approval gates for high-impact external actions

starter_local.description: Reasonable first local stack for code, planning, critique, and retrieval without immediately pulling massive weights.

strong_local_or_endpoint.description: Bigger models for machines with GPU resources or Hugging Face endpoints.

browser_frontend_light.description: Small models or APIs suitable for front-end experiments and low-latency UX.

large_gpu_balanced.description: Paid GPU endpoint profile: strong coder + strong reasoner/critic + embeddings. Good first serious backend.

large_gpu_maximum.description: Highest-power profile. Use provider-backed inference or costly multi-GPU endpoints. Requires explicit paid activation approval.

open_coder_primary.role: OpenAI-like code builder lane for repository edits, debugging, task implementation, and script generation.
open_coder_primary.license_note: Apache-2.0 per Hugging Face tags returned 2026-05-21.

advanced_coder_qwen3.role: High-strength coding and agentic planning lane for GPU endpoint use.
advanced_coder_qwen3.license_note: Apache-2.0 per Hugging Face tags returned 2026-05-21.

fast_reasoner_chat.role: General reasoning/chat lane for Focus command-center tasks and user-facing assistant behavior.
fast_reasoner_chat.license_note: Llama license; may require accepting model terms on Hugging Face.

tiny_reasoner_llama32.role: Small local/mobile-friendly reasoning lane for demos and lower-resource runs.
tiny_reasoner_llama32.license_note: Llama 3.2 license; may require accepting model terms on Hugging Face.

large_reasoner_llama33.role: Large general reasoning lane for endpoint/GPU use; closest open-model feel to frontier chat for broad planning.
large_reasoner_llama33.license_note: Llama license; likely requires accepting terms and GPU endpoint scale.

critic_code_lane.role: Claude-like skeptical code reviewer / critic lane for error review, alternate implementation plans, and adversarial checks.
critic_code_lane.license_note: License marked other on Hugging Face; review terms before commercial deployment.
recommended_runtime: Transformers with trust_remote_code only after review

embedding_light.role: Knowledge-base retrieval and semantic memory for Focus docs, Drive exports, Notion exports, code, and business facts.
embedding_light.license_note: Apache-2.0 per Hugging Face tags returned 2026-05-21.

embedding_strong.role: Stronger multilingual embedding/retrieval lane for mixed business docs and web captures.
embedding_strong.license_note: Review model card/license before commercial deployment; may require custom code.

frontier_coder_qwen_480b_fp8.role: Maximum-strength open coder/agentic coding lane. Use via provider-backed inference or very large dedicated endpoint; not a casual local download.
frontier_coder_qwen_480b_fp8.license_note: Apache-2.0 per Hugging Face metadata checked 2026-05-22.
recommended_runtime: Hugging Face dedicated endpoint on multi-GPU H200/A100/H100
frontier_coder_qwen_480b_fp8.large_gpu_note: 480B total / 35B active MoE class. Prefer hosted provider first; dedicated endpoint can be expensive.

large_coder_qwen3_30b_fp8.role: Large coding lane for fast GPU endpoint use with lower cost than 480B.
large_coder_qwen3_30b_fp8.license_note: Apache-2.0 per Hugging Face metadata checked 2026-05-22.
large_coder_qwen3_30b_fp8.large_gpu_note: Good first large-GPU coder endpoint target.

reasoner_deepseek_r1_70b.role: Large reasoning/critic lane for deliberate cross-examination and alternative reasoning.
reasoner_deepseek_r1_70b.license_note: MIT per Hugging Face metadata checked 2026-05-22.
reasoner_deepseek_r1_70b.large_gpu_note: 70B class; expect at least 2x80GB GPUs for full precision class deployments.

cost_control.manual_approval_note: Do not create or resume paid endpoints until the operator approves model, provider, instance, max hourly cost, and scale-to-zero settings.
